headline: AI for Senior Care: Fall Detection, Medication Reminders, and Social Companionship
description: AI helps seniors age in place -- detecting falls and calling for help, managing medications, and providing social companionship through conversational robots. From Apple Watch's life-saving fall detection to ElliQ's proactive AI companion, technology addresses the global challenge of supporting an aging population.

citation.name: AI for Aging in Place: Fall Detection, Medication Management, and Social Robots for Senior Care (2024-2025 Survey)
Socially Assistive Robotics for Elderly Care: Loneliness Reduction, Cognitive Stimulation, and Health Monitoring
